역대상 1:5.content: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.

역대상 1:6.content: The sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, Diphath, and Togarmah.

역대상 1:7.content: The sons of Javan: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Rodanim.

역대상 1:8.content: The sons of Ham: Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

역대상 1:9.content: The sons of Cush: Seba, Havilah, Sabta, Raama, Sabteca. The sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.

역대상 1:10.content: Cush became the father of Nimrod. He began to be a mighty one in the earth.

역대상 1:11.content: Mizraim became the father of Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,

역대상 1:12.content: Pathrusim, Casluhim (where the Philistines came from), and Caphtorim.

역대상 1:13.content: Canaan became the father of Sidon his firstborn, Heth,

역대상 1:14.content: the Jebusite, and the Amorite, the Girgashite,

역대상 1:15.content: the Hivite, the Arkite, the Sinite,

역대상 1:16.content: the Arvadite, the Zemarite, and the Hamathite.

역대상 1:17.content: The sons of Shem: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Hul, Gether, and Meshech.

역대상 1:18.content: Arpachshad became the father of Shelah, and Shelah became the father of Eber.

역대상 1:19.content: To Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg, for in his days the earth was divided; and his brother’s name was Joktan.

역대상 1:20.content: Joktan became the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,

역대상 1:23.content: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.

역대상 1:28.content: The sons of Abraham: Isaac and Ishmael.

역대상 1:29.content: These are their generations: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth; then Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,

역대상 1:31.content: Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah. These are the sons of Ishmael.

역대상 1:32.content: The sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bore Zimran, Jokshan, Medan, Midian, Ishbak, and Shuah. The sons of Jokshan: Sheba and Dedan.

역대상 1:33.content: The sons of Midian: Ephah, Epher, Hanoch, Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the sons of Keturah.

역대상 1:34.content: Abraham became the father of Isaac. The sons of Isaac: Esau and Israel.

역대상 1:35.content: The sons of Esau: Eliphaz, Reuel, Jeush, Jalam, and Korah.

역대상 1:36.content: The sons of Eliphaz: Teman, Omar, Zephi, Gatam, Kenaz, Timna, and Amalek.

역대상 1:37.content: The sons of Reuel: Nahath, Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah.

역대상 1:38.content: The sons of Seir: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah, Dishon, Ezer, and Dishan.

역대상 1:39.content: The sons of Lotan: Hori and Homam; and Timna was Lotan’s sister.

역대상 1:40.content: The sons of Shobal: Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah.

역대상 1:41.content: The son of Anah: Dishon. The sons of Dishon: Hamran, Eshban, Ithran, and Cheran.

역대상 1:42.content: The sons of Ezer: Bilhan, Zaavan, and Jaakan. The sons of Dishan: Uz and Aran.

역대상 1:43.content: Now these are the kings who reigned in the land of Edom, before any king reigned over the children of Israel: Bela the son of Beor; and the name of his city was Dinhabah.

역대상 1:44.content: Bela died, and Jobab the son of Zerah of Bozrah reigned in his place.

역대상 1:45.content: Jobab died, and Husham of the land of the Temanites reigned in his place.

역대상 1:46.content: Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who struck Midian in the field of Moab, reigned in his place; and the name of his city was Avith.

역대상 1:47.content: Hadad died, and Samlah of Masrekah reigned in his place.

역대상 1:48.content: Samlah died, and Shaul of Rehoboth by the River reigned in his place.

역대상 1:49.content: Shaul died, and Baal Hanan the son of Achbor reigned in his place.

역대상 1:50.content: Baal Hanan died, and Hadad reigned in his place; and the name of his city was Pai: and his wife’s name was Mehetabel, the daughter of Matred, the daughter of Mezahab.

역대상 1:51.content: Then Hadad died. The chiefs of Edom were: chief Timna, chief Aliah, chief Jetheth,

역대상 1:52.content: chief Oholibamah, chief Elah, chief Pinon,

역대상 1:53.content: chief Kenaz, chief Teman, chief Mibzar,

역대상 1:54.content: chief Magdiel, and chief Iram. These are the chiefs of Edom.
